Case Study

Open Lakehouse Starter

A small-team lakehouse stack with dlt, dbt, Superset, and MinIO.

Starter platform Python Lakehouse dlt dbt Superset

Why it exists

Small teams often need a usable lakehouse before they need platform complexity, so the real challenge is choosing a stack that starts light without painting the team into a corner.

Technical center

The project combines dlt ingestion, dbt transformations, Superset dashboards, and MinIO-backed object storage into a setup that is intentionally simple to start and expandable later.

What to show next

A reproducible demo with one source, one dbt model chain, and one live dashboard would show where the starter kit saves real setup time.

Repository Related article
Stack overview

A future architecture screenshot covering dlt ingestion, dbt models, MinIO storage, and Superset dashboards.

Setup flow

A short bootstrap walkthrough showing how quickly the stack can be brought up for a small team.
